mass_times: Sunday Masses: 7:00 AM, 9:00 AM, 11:00 AM, and 5:30 PM. Weekday Masses: Monday-Saturday at 6:30 AM. [Edit these to match your real parish schedule.]
sacraments_baptism: Baptisms are held on the 2nd Saturday of each month. Please register at the parish office at least 3 weeks in advance and bring the child's birth certificate and godparent details. A short baptism preparation class is required for parents and godparents.
confession_schedule: Confessions are heard every Saturday from 4:00 PM to 5:00 PM, and 30 minutes before daily Mass. Confession is also available by appointment - call the parish office to arrange a time.
events: Check the Events tab in the app for this month's calendar, including feast days, youth group meetings, and fundraisers. [This answer pulls live from Firestore 'events' collection.]
donations: You can give via M-Pesa Paybill [insert number], bank transfer [insert account], or in person at the parish office. Recurring giving and donation receipts are available on request.
contact_info: Parish Office: [phone number] | Email: [parish email] | Address: [physical address] | Office Hours: Mon-Fri, 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM.
staff_directory: Parish Priest: [Fr. Name] | Assistant Priest: [Fr. Name] | Youth Ministry Coordinator: [Name] | Choir Director: [Name]. Contact the parish office to reach any of them directly.
scripture_lookup: Today's readings can be viewed in the Daily Readings section of the app, sourced from the current liturgical calendar. [This answer pulls live, date-based content from Firestore.]
parish_history: [Parish Name] was founded in [year] under the [Diocese Name]. It is dedicated to [Patron Saint] and has served the local Catholic community for [X] years. [Fill in with your parish's real history.]
general_faq: For registration, mass intentions, volunteering, or other parish services, please visit the parish office or check the Services section of the app.
